sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58351" key="koilofqalmi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοιλοφθαλμ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58351.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sunkenness of eyes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
